component.name: Capture Viewer
component.summary: Use a video capture card as a monitor

description.p: Capture Viewer shows the live input of a USB/HDMI video capture card in a window and plays its audio through your default output device — turning a laptop plus a capture card into a portable monitor.

ul.li: Pick the video capture device and audio source in Settings
Low-latency live preview via GStreamer and a GTK4 paintable
Automatic reconnect when the capture card is unplugged and replugged
Distraction-free fullscreen (F11), Settings on F1, volume remembered between runs

description.p: Fullscreen now hides the top bar immediately (F11 toggles it, Esc quits), F1 opens Settings, and the AppImage no longer bundles the host GPU driver stack so it runs under SteamOS Gaming Mode (gamescope).
